title: Equipment & Items
subtitle: Complete reference for potions, gear, stats, and equipment mechanics in Tap of Exile.
potionsDesc: Potions are consumable items that heal a percentage of your max HP per sip. Each potion has a flask type (determines heal amount) and quality (determines max charges). Equip up to 2 potions in consumable slots.
qualityDesc: Higher quality potions have more charges, making them more valuable. Quality determines how many times you can use a potion before it runs out.
lootDesc: After each combat, {{rolls}} independent rolls are made against the loot pool. Each roll has approximately a 50% chance to drop nothing. Items are weighted — common potions appear far more frequently than legendary ones.
lootAvgDesc: Common items drop much more often than rare or legendary ones. On average you can expect about {{min}}–{{max}} item checks per fight, but many of those will come up empty.
mapKeysSub: Map keys are special items that grant access to endgame maps and boss encounters.
regularMapKeySource: Drops from other maps (60% same tier, 20% tier up)
bossKeySource: 5% drop from T5+ maps, 5% from boss maps
gearDesc: Equipment drops from monsters and bosses. Each piece has a slot, subtype, rarity, item level, rolled stats, and potentially an implicit stat. Higher tiers and rarities yield stronger items.
tierSystemDesc: Item level determines the tier. Higher tiers unlock wider stat ranges.
statRangesDesc: Click a slot to expand and see the full stat ranges for each tier.
offense1: Flat damage bonuses add to your base, then percentage bonuses multiply the total
offense2: Crit chance and crit multiplier stack from all sources
defense1: Armor reduces physical damage — more armor is better against hard-hitting enemies
defense3: Block chance stacks with the Warrior's class special
surviv1: Flat HP adds to your base, percentage HP scales the total
surviv2: Life regen and life on hit provide sustain in longer fights
utility1: Gold Find increases gold rewards from monsters
utility2: XP Bonus helps you level up faster
